content: Just as Self-Refine enables LLMs to iteratively polish raw outputs without external training data or reinforcement learning, Reflexion’s dynamic self-reflection memory system can be layered on top of Self-Refine to turn disconnected one-off feedback cycles into cumulative, long-term self-improvement for autonomous AI agents. This creates a two-tier self-improvement architecture where iterative local refinement is anchored to global cumulative memory of past reflection outcomes, eliminating the need for external oversight entirely.
